title: senecio folidentatus
intro: Senecio folidentatus, also known as the Woolly Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio folidentatus include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating wounds, as well as being used as an anti-microbial agent to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Senecio folidentatus typically include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
